payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a durable personal memory. Please provide specific facts, preferences, projects, or instructions you want saved.

entity_resolution.reason: Request is overly broad and does not provide specific, durable personal facts or preferences to store.

repair_options: Specify a particular AI-related preference to remember, e.g. "Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts."
Specify an AI project or goal to remember, e.g. "Remember that I am building an AI chatbot for customer support."
Specify a learning interest, e.g. "Remember that I’m studying reinforcement learning."
